svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.3.0 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.2 Safari/537.36" version="29.3.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="vwan-failover" name="vWAN VPN Failover"> <mxGraphModel dx="606" dy="610" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="vwanOuter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 6;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6B7280;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="500" x="200" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="vwanTitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="Azure vWAN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="200" y="45" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hub" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#1F2937;fillColor=#FFFFFF;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="Secured Hub
(Azure Firewall + Routing Intent)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="400" x="250" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#1F2937;fillColor=#FFFFFF;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=15;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=10;" value="VPN Gateway (ASN 65515)
Instance 0 | Instance 1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="300" x="300" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lblLeftConn" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Consolas;fontSize=13;" value="er-path-site
(conn-er-path)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="250" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lblRightConn" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Consolas;fontSize=13;" value="vpn-backup-site
(conn-vpn-backup)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="450" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipsecLeft" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=12;opacity=90;" value="IPsec Tunnel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="280" y="352" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ipsecRight" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=12;opacity=90;" value="IPsec Tunnel" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="480" y="352" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bgpLeft" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=13;" value="BGP: 10.0.0.0/16
(aggregate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="40" y="345" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bgpRight" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=13;" value="BGP: 10.0.1.0/24
10.0.2.0/24
(more-specific)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="710" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onpremOuter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 6;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#6B7280;fillColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="270" width="500" x="200" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="onpremTitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontFamily=Segoe UI;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="On-Prem VNet (10.0.0.0/16)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="200" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#1F2937;fillColor=#FFFFFF;fontFamily=Consolas;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=10;spacing=10;" value="frr-router
(ER-PATH)

ASN 65001

BGP Peer:
192.168.1.12

Advertises
10.0.0.0/16" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="210" x="245" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#1F2937;fillColor=#FFFFFF;fontFamily=Consolas;fontSize=13;align=center;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=10;spacing=10;" value="frr-router-backup
(VPN-BACKUP)

ASN 65001

BGP Peer:
192.168.1.13

Advertises
10.0.1.0/24
10.0.2.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="210" x="475" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edgeRightB" edge="1" parent="1" source="gw" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;startArrow=none;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 6;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FBBF24;" target="r2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="530" y="300" /> <mxPoint x="530" y="430" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="VoV5ix_bQZcnMFca913c-1" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=none;startArrow=none;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 6;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#FBBF24;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="360" y="302" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="432" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="360" y="282" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="442" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
